name: ai-native-university
description: AI Native University — AI-powered learning platform with courses, quizzes, and an AI tutor. Uses OpenRouter for all AI calls.

scripts.lint: node -c server.js && node -c src/lib/openrouter.js && node -c src/data/courses.js && node -c src/data/quizzes.js && node -c src/routes/courses.js && node -c src/routes/tutor.js && node -c src/routes/quiz.js
